Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection until SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection when followed by SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due in variants where reviewers are repeatedly declined
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Elapsed time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the first Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to result in a stable assignment of reviewers (i.e., sequence ending with SW-Reviewer Agreed without subsequent decline or unavailability)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in variants that include Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded compared to those that do not
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and the end of case where activity 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded occurs

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Unavailable
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-AE Recommendation overdue in prolonged review cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the final SW-Reviewer Agreed in multi-round reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
